[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Folded opening-hours + Google-listing backfills into the hourly hit_list_enrich_contact cron (PR #88), then extended the gap-fill set with Shop Type / Phone / Website using a canonical-taxonomy heuristic + 'Other' fallback (PR #89). Drained 96 rows of accumulated gaps; 0 blank Shop Type remaining. DApp views (stores_nearby, stores_by_status) already aligned with the 12-value canonical taxonomy — no DApp PR needed. Supersedes the earlier same-window submission that incorrectly used Type=Software.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
